dose_response.reason: Generated arc captures amplification of surrogate misspecification via offline preference optimization leading to chemists' reliance and synthesis of poor leads wasting resources; same causal logic as reference.
dose_response.reference: Offline preference optimization amplifies surrogate misspecification, producing unreliable property estimates that, in drug lead optimization, mislead chemists who synthesize poor leads, wasting resources and eroding trust.
dose_response.generated: Molecular stitching with offline preference optimization amplifies surrogate model misspecification, through medicinal chemists selecting virtual candidates for synthesis, triggers reliance on unverifiable surrogate model estimates, leading to synthesis of suboptimal drug leads wasting resources and delaying development.
